tasks.label: tauri:dev
tasks.detail: Build and run the tray app with hot-reload (needs tauri-cli).

tasks.label: tauri:build
tasks.detail: Produce a release bundle/installer for the current OS.

tasks.label: helper:build
tasks.detail: Build the privileged helper binary (run elevated to test apply).

tasks.label: test:core
tasks.detail: Run the core validation/mask unit tests.

tasks.label: install:tauri-cli
tasks.detail: One-time: install the Tauri 2 CLI used by the dev/build tasks.
